synopsis: The Ewok Adventure was a book-and-record set published as part of Buena Vista Records' Read-Along Adventures series. It was an adaptation of the TV movie Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure. It was produced by Ted Kryczko and released in 1984 as story book with 7" 33 ⅓ rpm record and Cassette tape. It is unknown who narrated the record as credits were not provided along with the book or record.
title: The Ewok Adventure (Caravan of Courage)
